questions.question: What are the first three parts to check?
questions.passRule: Staff can answer in simple English or Khmer after training review.

questions.question: Why do we check quantity first?
questions.answer: Because quantity controls portions and flavor limits.
questions.passRule: Staff can answer in simple English or Khmer after training review.

questions.question: What should staff read for advanced flavors?
questions.answer: Both the number and the flavor name.
questions.passRule: Staff can answer in simple English or Khmer after training review.

questions.question: What is the difference?
questions.answer: Sauce is wet coating; dry rub is seasoning powder.
questions.passRule: Staff can answer in simple English or Khmer after training review.

questions.question: What marker should staff look for?
questions.passRule: Staff can answer in simple English or Khmer after training review.

questions.question: What is the default heat?
questions.passRule: Staff can answer in simple English or Khmer after training review.

questions.question: When do we confirm heat?
questions.passRule: Staff can answer in simple English or Khmer after training review.

questions.question: What should staff do if Nuclear is unclear?
questions.answer: Ask owner or manager before cooking.
questions.passRule: Staff can answer in simple English or Khmer after training review.

questions.question: When can staff include an add-on?
questions.answer: Only when selected, charged, or explicitly included.
questions.passRule: Staff can answer in simple English or Khmer after training review.

questions.question: What is the correct prep order?
questions.answer: Sauce first, dry rub second, drizzle last.
questions.passRule: Staff can answer in simple English or Khmer after training review.

questions.question: What must be checked before handoff?
questions.answer: Item, flavor, add-ons, dips, drink, napkins, customer name.
questions.passRule: Staff can answer in simple English or Khmer after training review.

questions.question: Where should a bottle go?
questions.passRule: Staff can answer in simple English or Khmer after training review.

questions.question: What do we do when key info is missing?
questions.answer: Ask first; do not cook yet.
questions.passRule: Staff can answer in simple English or Khmer after training review.

questions.question: What does PRICE_REQUIRED_FROM_MENU mean?
questions.answer: Do not guess; staff or owner must confirm.
questions.passRule: Staff can answer in simple English or Khmer after training review.

questions.question: What should staff say for unavailable items?
questions.passRule: Staff can answer in simple English or Khmer after training review.

questions.question: When can staff dispatch bank-transfer orders?
questions.passRule: Staff can answer in simple English or Khmer after training review.

questions.question: What is the safe direct-order message?
questions.answer: Faster reorder, clearer customization, staff confirms directly.
questions.passRule: Staff can answer in simple English or Khmer after training review.

questions.question: What areas reset after rush?
questions.answer: Sauce, dry rub, packaging, and order screen.
questions.passRule: Staff can answer in simple English or Khmer after training review.
